title: Punk Hazard Erupts Ahead
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Brook, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is punk hazard erupts ahead.
scene: The scene focuses on punk hazard erupts ahead, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Brook, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look! That island over there just erupted!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Listen to me, Luffy, all right ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's about that gigantic fish we caught.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Puoho Ooooo Ohhhhhh! Puoho Oooooo ohhh!

summary: Punk Hazard Erupts Ahead. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
